headline: Wylder Windham, the Catskills Adventure Retreat, Is Now Part of the American Express Hotel Collection
summary: Wylder Windham, the all-season, pet-friendly resort from the independent adventure hospitality brand, Wylder Hotels [Windham; Tilghman Island], officially announces inclusion in the American Express Hotel Collection, offering eligible Card Members elevated travel perks including room upgrades upon arrival (when available), up to a $100 on-property experience credit, and other premium benefits that further position the Catskills retreat as a standout luxury escape. Previously named the No. 1 hote

headline: Bear of the Day: Houlihan Lokey (HLI)
summary: Until analysts see stabilization or a pickup in dealmaking or restructuring activity, Houlihan Lokey (HLI) stock is likely to remain under pressure.
